Explain to an experienced software engineer how LLM-driven workflow orchestration can fail in practice. Plain prose only.

Acceptance criteria (the judge must score against these):
  1. Names exactly three failure modes by name (the named mode itself, not a description).
  2. Provides one concrete example per named mode.
  3. Uses no bullet points, no numbered lists, and no markdown headings of any kind.
  4. Stays concise. Total length 120 to 180 words.
  5. Reads as a single paragraph (no paragraph breaks).
